phases.title: Phase 1: Dispatch + Pre-flight
phases.objective: Wire pre-flight gate runner, fix phase-skip logic, start digest pipeline

tasks.title: Extract isPhaseComplete() with cancelled support
tasks.description: Extract inline phase-skip logic from ship.ts into a named function isPhaseComplete(phase): boolean. Must return true when ALL tasks have status 'completed' OR 'cancelled'. Currently only checks 'completed'. (FR-014, gap: missing)

tasks.title: Add emit_event() to work-until-done.sh
tasks.description: Create an emit_event() bash function in work-until-done.sh that appends structured lines to $RUNS_DIR/<feature>_p<phase>.events sidecar file. Format: '<STAGE>: <outcome summary>'. Call emit_event after each stage transition (BRANCH_SETUP, IMPLEMENT, CODE_REVIEW, UAT_REVIEW, PR_CI, DONE). (FR-017, gap: greenfield)

tasks.title: Add assembleDigest() to ship.ts and wire to manifest
tasks.description: Create assembleDigest(eventsFilePath): string[] in ship.ts (or manifest.ts). Reads the .events sidecar file line-by-line. Add 'digest' field to ExecutionManifestSchema as z.array(z.string()).default([]). Pass digest to writeManifest() call. (FR-012, FR-017, gap: greenfield + missing)

tasks.title: Add pre-flight gate runner to work-until-done.sh
tasks.description: Before run_implement(), read tasks.json for the current phase, execute each task's gateScript. If gate exits 0 → log 'pre-flight PASS — gate already satisfied, skipping' and skip implementation. If any gate fails → proceed to implementation. (FR-003, gap: greenfield)

phases.title: Phase 2: Resilience & Bail
phases.objective: Wire dirty-tree guard, staging validation, and structured failure context

tasks.title: Add dirty-tree guard to wud-branch.sh
tasks.description: At the top of wud-branch.sh (before any branch operations), run 'git status --porcelain'. If output is non-empty, emit 'Dirty working tree — commit or stash before shipping' to stderr and exit 1. (FR-002, gap: greenfield)

tasks.title: Call validate-staging.sh from work-until-done.sh
tasks.description: In run_implement(), after agent exits 0 and before '$WUD_BRANCH push', call 'scripts/dev/validate-staging.sh $FEATURE'. If validation fails (exit 1), log warning and re-run agent with corrective guidance (or fail the iteration). (FR-016, gap: missing)

tasks.title: Add failureContext to CIRCUIT_BREAK state
tasks.description: When save_state('CIRCUIT_BREAK', ...) is called, include a failureContext JSON object with: openTasks (array of task IDs still open), lastVerdict ('NO-GO'), iterationTimeline (array of {iteration, stage, verdict, durationS}), digest (from .events sidecar). Requires tracking iteration history in a bash array during the main loop. (FR-018, gap: missing)

phases.title: Phase 3: Verification & Artifacts
phases.objective: Agent-Native output wrapper, config fail-fast fix, full test coverage

tasks.title: Add [exit:N | Xs] output wrapper to ship command
tasks.description: Wrap the shipCommand action's final output in the ADR-004 Agent-Native format: '[exit:N | Xs]' on stderr. Command type is 'mutator'. This is the structured signal that agents parse. (FR-015, gap: greenfield)

tasks.title: Add --format json to ship command
tasks.description: Add '--format <format>' option to shipCommand (default: 'human'). When 'json', suppress banner/color output and emit a JSON object on stdout with: {feature, phase, exitCode, durationS, runId, manifestPath}. (FR-015, gap: greenfield)

tasks.title: Fix FR-009 agent config fail-fast
tasks.description: When .gwrkrc.json is missing agents.implement and no --agent override is provided, ship.ts currently falls through silently. It MUST crash with 'Missing required config: agents.implement' and exit 1. Ensure Zod validation covers this path. (FR-009, gap: wrong)
